title: Biome Plus
description: Biome Plus enriches Minecraft with more vibrant biomes. Discover the Birch Forest Plus, featuring lusher vegetation and vanilla animals! Perfect for those looking for a more immersive, realistic exploration experience.
body:
🏞️ MOD "Biome Plus" - Rediscover Minecraft’s Natural Beauty! 🏞️
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/MXrr4diLo1Q" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe> Want to dive into a richer exploration experience? Biome Plus enhances Minecraft with improved biomes, new mobs, structures, blocks, and atmospheres, rediscovering the beauty of nature in a whole new way.

## 🌳 Overview
Biome Plus is a Minecraft mod that expands the game world with enhanced biomes, new mobs, unique structures, decorative blocks, and experimental items. The mod is designed to bring both nostalgia and innovative gameplay elements into your adventures.

## 🌲 Added Biomes
Birch Forest Plus – A lush forest enriched with new flowers and roaming deer.

Forest Plus – An expansive forest with tall oak trees and a diverse terrain.

Old Growth Birch Forest Plus – A denser birch forest with imposing, ancient trees.

Original Biome – A nostalgic biome inspired by Minecraft Classic, featuring the iconic terrain and color palette of the early game with simplified yet charming block textures.

## 🏚️ Added Structures
Ruined Temple (Birch Forest) – A mysterious, crumbling temple hidden deep within the birch woods.

Abandoned House – A deserted house guarded by an Illusioner boss.

Nether Structures – Small ruins scattered throughout the Nether, offering rare loot like Balloon Leather.

Cherry Trees – Scattered cherry trees that add vivid color and variety to the landscape.

## 🐾 Added Mobs
Fawn – A gentle creature that wanders the Birch Forest Plus.

Balloon (Nether) – A Nether mob that drops Balloon Leather, essential for repairing the magical amulet.

Steve and Alex – Special human-like entities that can be obtained by converting zombies and skeletons using Nether Star Fragments and Bone Fragments, respectively, with Steve acting as a protector against hostile mobs.

## 🪵 New Blocks
Log Hollow – A decorative log block featuring a hollow core, available in various wood types (e.g., Oak Log Hollow, Birch Log Hollow), perfect for detailed builds and immersive forest designs.

## 🎵 Additional Features
Music Discs – All structures have a chance to contain unique music discs, including tracks that are rare or were previously unavailable.

## ⚙️ Experimental Blocks & Items
The mod also introduces a list of experimental blocks and items which are only available in Creative mode under the Operator section. These experimental features are intended for testing and advanced building, allowing players to experiment with new gameplay mechanics without affecting the survival experience.
